title: arthrolophis pumilus
intro: Arthrolophis pumilus, also known as the dwarf club moss, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arthrolophis pumilus include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Arthrolophis pumilus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
